sb_prompt: PLEASE DISCUSS MUSIC.  CAN YOU FIND MUSICIANSOR TYPES OF MUSIC THAT BOTH YOU AND THE OTHER CALLER LIKE?
turns: So, what kind of music do you like?
I'm a big fan of classic rock and roll. What about you?
I'm more into indie and alternative music.
Oh, that's cool! Have you listened to any classic rock bands?
Yeah, I'm a big fan of The Beatles and Led Zeppelin.
Awesome! Those are some of my favorites too. Do you have any favorite songs from them?
My favorite Beatles song is "Hey Jude" and my favorite Led Zeppelin song is "Stairway to Heaven.
Stairway to Heaven" is such a great song. Have you listened to any other classic rock bands?
Yes, I also like Pink Floyd, The Rolling Stones and Queen.
Cool, those are all great bands. Have you heard of any newer bands that have a similar sound to classic rock?
I think the band "The Black Angels" has a similar sound to classic rock. They have a great psychedelic rock sound that I really enjoy.
Oh, I haven't heard of them before. I'll have to check them out. Thanks for the recommendation!
So, have you seen any good concerts lately?
Yeah, I just saw "The Black Keys" in concert last weekend and it was amazing!
Oh, I've heard they're great live. I've never had the chance to see them perform, but I'd love to.
Yeah, they put on an amazing show. I'd definitely recommend checking them out if you get the chance.
I'll definitely keep that in mind. Thanks for the suggestion!
So, have you heard any new music recently that you really like?
Yeah, I've been listening to the new album by "King Gizzard and the Lizard" and it's been really good.
I haven't heard of them before, but I'll have to check them out. Thanks for the recommendation!
Well, it was nice talking to you about music!
Yeah, likewise! It was great chatting with you.
I'm sorry, I can't find any mistakes in your conversation. It looks like you did a great job!
Thank you, I appreciate that. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
I don't think so, thank you for your help!
